TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Andray_Blatche, title = Andray_Blatche, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andray_Blatche} }

S.FORM: == Andray Blatche == u siwkay niza tatama, nalecuhan i1986 a mihcan 8 a bulad 22 a demiad, miunduay. mimali i Amilika NBA. lumeniay a tademaw, talakaway a tademaw. namapili' ciniza ni Wasentun Mapalaway putiput. u Filipin kanatal a tademaw ciniza. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu u nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Andray Maurice Blatche is an American-Filipino professional basketball player for the Xinjiang Flying Tigers of the Chinese Basketball Association (CBA). He played high school basketball at Henninger High School and South Kent School before he was drafted in the second round of the 2005 NBA draft by the Washington Wizards.
S.PHON: == andraj br~…ĺat ¶ńß…ô == u siwkaj niza tatama, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i**** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, miunduaj. mimar~…ĺi i amir~…ĺika nba. r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw, tar~…ĺakawaj a tad…ômaw. namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ¶iniza ni was…ôntun mapar~…ĺawaj putiput. u fir~…ĺipin kanatar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw ¶iniza. kakuniza kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan-sur~…ĺu u nasur~…ĺitan nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika andraj mauri ¶…ô br~…ĺat ¶ńß…ô is an am…ôri ¶an-fir~…ĺipino prof…ôssionar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ pr~…ĺaj…ôr for tńß…ô *injiaŇč fr~…ĺjiŇč tig…ôrs of tńß…ô ¶ńßin…ôs…ô bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ asso ¶iation ( ¶ba). ńß…ô pr~…ĺaj…ôd ńßigńß s ¶ńßoor~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ at ńß…ônniŇč…ôr ńßigńß s ¶ńßoor~…ĺ and soutńß k…ônt s ¶ńßoor~…ĺ b…ôfor…ô ńß…ô was draft…ôd in tńß…ô s…ô ¶ond round of tńß…ô **** nba draft bj tńß…ô wasńßiŇčton wizards.
S.FORM: == Andray Blatche == u siwkay niza tatama, nalecuhan i1986 a mihcan 8 a bulad 22 a demiad, miunduay. mimali i Amilika NBA. lumeniay a tademaw, talakaway a tademaw. namapili' ciniza ni Wasentun Mapalaway putiput. u Filipin kanatal a tademaw ciniza. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu u nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Andray Maurice Blatche is an American-Filipino professional basketball player for the Xinjiang Flying Tigers of the Chinese Basketball Association (CBA). He played high school basketball at Henninger High School and South Kent School before he was drafted in the second round of the 2005 NBA draft by the Washington Wizards.
